# Bounded Systems
> Bounded authority for AI agents

Capability security for AI agents — authority drawn at the door, not the process or container. Every claim graded against the running code.

## The bet
Draw the boundary at the door — a scope-bounded set of capabilities an agent acts through, not the process, not the container.

## Links
- [GitHub](https://github.com/bounded-systems)
- [Writing](https://bounded.tools/blog/)
- [Get in touch](mailto:hello@bounded.tools)
